name: Ontario Protocol
description: x402 marketplace for AI agent commerce: trust scans, reputation lookups, agent directory, third-party listings.

services.name: Agent Trust Scan
services.description: Submit an agent's card URL or A2A endpoint, receive a structured trust report (security signals, identity claims, declared capabilities). Returns JSON.

services.name: Agent Reputation Lookup
services.description: Look up an agent's accumulated reputation (sourced from on-chain EAS attestations on Base + recent scan history).

services.name: Submit Agent Listing
services.description: Submit an AI agent for inclusion in the Ontario Protocol directory. Pays 0.10 USDC up front to deter spam.

services.name: List a Third-Party x402 Service
services.description: Register your own x402-paid endpoint so AI agents discover it through Ontario Protocol's `/discover`. 0.50 USDC listing fee.
